summary: Iteration 226 - Ripple Edit System Testing. Backend: 13/13 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All core ripple edit UI elements working correctly. Divine Director page loads with track rows showing duration +/- controls, lock/unlock toggle, timeline position bar, start time indicator, and timeline ruler. Speed Bridge modal shows 4 tiers.

integration_issues.issue: Trial Graduation overlay appears on page load and blocks interaction. User must dismiss it before using Divine Director.
integration_issues.note: This is expected behavior for trial users, not a bug

critical_code_review_comments: mixer_director.py: ripple_edit_tracks function (line 760) correctly computes delta and shifts unlocked tracks
mixer_director.py: POST /mixer/projects/ripple returns shifted_indices and ripple_delta as expected
mixer_director.py: POST /mixer/tracks/toggle-lock correctly toggles ripple_locked field
mixer_director.py: Keyframes are clamped to new duration when track is shortened
SuanpanMixer.js: TrackRow component has all required data-testids (track-lock-*, dur-minus-*, dur-plus-*, track-duration-*)
SuanpanMixer.js: Timeline ruler shows tick marks every 15 seconds when tracks exist
SuanpanMixer.js: handleRipple function correctly shifts subsequent unlocked tracks in frontend state
SuanpanMixer.js: Ripple wave animation uses linear gradient sweep (0.6s duration)
SuanpanMixer.js: Timeline position bar (3px height) shows track position relative to totalDuration
test_credentials: email: grad_test_522@test.com, password: password (tier: ultra_player after trial graduation)
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Ripple_Project_*, TEST_Toggle_Lock_*, TEST_Ripple_Shift_*, TEST_Ripple_Negative_*, TEST_Ripple_Positive_*, TEST_Ripple_Keyframes_*, TEST_Ripple_UI_226 projects during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 226 verified all ripple edit features: (1) POST /api/mixer/projects/ripple shifts unlocked subsequent tracks when duration changes, preserves locked tracks. (2) POST /api/mixer/tracks/toggle-lock toggles ripple_locked on a track. (3) POST /api/mixer/projects saves tracks with ripple_locked field. (4) GET /api/mixer/projects/{id} loads tracks with ripple_locked preserved. (5) Keyframes in changed track are clamped to new duration. (6) Response includes shifted_indices and ripple_delta. (7) Negative delta (shorten) shifts tracks backward, positive (lengthen) shifts forward. (8) GET /api/mixer/recommendations returns hexagram info with trigram data. (9) Frontend: Track rows show duration +/- buttons, lock/unlock icon toggle, timeline position bar, start time indicator. (10) Timeline ruler appears above track list when tracks exist. (11) Speed Bridge modal shows 4 tiers (Discovery/Player/Ultra Player/Sovereign). (12) Test user is on ultra_player tier after clicking 'Continue with free plan' on trial graduation overlay.

ripple_edit_shifts_unlocked_tracks.details: POST /api/mixer/projects/ripple correctly shifts unlocked subsequent tracks by duration delta

ripple_edit_preserves_locked_tracks.details: Tracks with ripple_locked=true are not shifted during ripple edit

ripple_edit_clamps_keyframes.details: Keyframes in changed track are clamped to new duration

ripple_edit_returns_shifted_indices.details: Response includes shifted_indices array and ripple_delta value

save_project_with_ripple_locked.details: POST /api/mixer/projects saves tracks with ripple_locked field

get_project_preserves_ripple_locked.details: GET /api/mixer/projects/{id} returns tracks with ripple_locked preserved

negative_delta_shifts_backward.details: Shortening a track shifts subsequent unlocked tracks backward

positive_delta_shifts_forward.details: Lengthening a track shifts subsequent unlocked tracks forward

recommendations_hexagram_trigrams.details: GET /api/mixer/recommendations returns hexagram info with lower/upper trigram data

frontend_duration_controls.details: Track rows show duration +/- buttons (data-testid: dur-minus-*, dur-plus-*)

frontend_lock_toggle.details: Track rows show lock/unlock icon toggle (data-testid: track-lock-*)

frontend_timeline_position_bar.details: Track rows show 3px timeline position bar at top showing position/duration

frontend_start_time_indicator.details: Track rows show start time indicator (Clock icon with time)

frontend_timeline_ruler.details: Timeline ruler appears above track list with tick marks every 15 seconds

frontend_speed_bridge_4_tiers.details: Speed Bridge modal shows 4 tier cards (Discovery/Player/Ultra Player/Sovereign)
